acquisition method: In contrast to typical DDA approaches, which classically employ narrow precursor isolation windows
alkylation reagent: Reversible blockage of cysteines was performed with S-methyl methanethiosulfonate (MMTS, Merck, Sigma-Aldrich, 64306-1 ML)
alkylation concentration: at 4 mM for 30 min at room temperature
cleavage agent: digested with trypsin applying high humidity and rehydration at 50 °C
collision energy: Fragmentation by HCD was done using a normalized collision energy of 30%
enrichment method: using anti-flag M2 beads specifically enriching for the flag-tagged bait protein
fragmentation method: Fragmentation by HCD was done using a normalized collision energy of 30%
instrument: the Orbitrap Exploris 480 mass spectrometer was operated in the data-dependent mode
ionization type: coupled to the Orbitrap Exploris 480 mass spectrometer, equipped with an EASY-spray ion source
labeling: the number of proteins identified for single WWA measurements without matching is on par with other current label-free single cell proteomics workflows
reduction concentration: added up to 1 mM and cysteine reduction performed for 30 min at 60 °C
